name: Jay Berliner
abstract: Jay Berliner (born May 24, 1940) is an American guitarist who has worked with Harry Belafonte, Ron Carter, Charles Mingus, and Van Morrison, among others.

works.t: The Girl Friend: The Blue Room

concerts.label: Seeds of Peace 10th Anniversary Gala
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Gene Bertoncini
about_quotes.evidence: I worked a lot with a guy named Jay Berliner... And he had written, the contractor thought, a very difficult part for me and Jay.
about_quotes.doc_title: Gene Bertoncini interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 13, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Hubert Laws
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] That was the next one, with you, Toots, and of course R.C. – Ron Carter – Jay Berliner, Grady Tate. [INTERVIEWEE] Right.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hubert Laws — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
